title: CodeGrind AI Assistant Enhancements: Smarter help, faster guidance
summary: Showcase the upgraded Azure OpenAI-powered assistant in CodeGrind with multi-model support, improved chat UX, and real-time problem-solving guidance.
core_message: CodeGrind now features an enhanced AI assistant powered by Azure OpenAI with multi-model support, delivering smarter, context-aware help directly in the practice editor. Users get guided problem-solving, code suggestions, and seamless switching between models for faster learning.
cta: Try the new AI assistant in your next practice session and share your experience with #CodeGrindAI
visual_brief: A short demo video showing a user asking for hints, the AI assistant proposing a plan, code snippets appearing in the editor, and a quick toggle between AI models. Include UI elements: code editor, chat pane, model switcher, and a subtle CodeGrind brand presence.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

linkedin.text: CodeGrind introduces an upgraded AI assistant powered by Azure OpenAI with multi-model support, delivering smarter, context-aware help directly in the practice editor. Users get guided problem-solving, code suggestions, and quick model switching for faster learning. Explore the enhanced experience and share feedback with #CodeGrindAI. Learn more: https://codegrind.online
